title: apalatoa zeylanica
intro: Apalatoa zeylanica, also known as the 'Ceylonese tree', is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. The medicinal properties of Apalatoa zeylanica lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving fever, and treating skin conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional medicine, Apalatoa zeylanica is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its roots are also used in herbal preparations like oils and salves to enhance their medicinal effects.
